quick_skim.title: Aerial-ground LiDAR place recognition with patch-level self-supervised learning and expanded reciprocal re-ranking
quick_skim.abstract: LiDAR place recognition determines one's position on a prior point cloud map. The most studied ground-level LiDAR place recognition suffers from pre-visit requirements, incomplete coverage, and limited perspectives. Using pre-acquired, full-coverage Airborne Laser Scanning (ALS) data as an aerial prior map overcomes these drawbacks, making cross-view place recognition necessary and advantageous. However, aerial-ground LiDAR place recognition faces significant challenges, including the domain gap between aerial and ground point clouds, and false positives during initial retrieval. To address these challenges, we present a novel retrieval and re-ranking framework for aerial-ground LiDAR place recognition. Based on the priors that neighboring point cloud patches share similar semantics with anchor patch, our retrieval network introduces patch-level self-supervised learning modules at multiple scales and integrates with scene-level learning to improve global feature discriminativeness between aerial and ground point clouds. Furthermore, leveraging the structured spatial distribution of ALS point clouds, we introduce an Expanded Reciprocal (ER) re-ranking algorithm to exploit neighborhood information maximally and refine each feature based on neighbor features, which are then used to update the similarity matrix for final ranking. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our retrieval network outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, achieving a 9.8\% improvement in average Recall@1 and a 3.2\% improvement in average Recall@1\% on the CS-Urban-Scenes, while also showing the best performance on the CS-Campus3D dataset. Additionally, our ER re-ranking algorithm further boosts the average Recall@1 by 4.9\% on CS-Campus3D and 10.2\% on CS-Urban-Scenes without additional training.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Aerial-ground LiDAR place recognition using cross-view point cloud fusion
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用空地LiDAR点云融合进行位置识别
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用空地LiDAR点云融合进行位置识别
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用空地LiDAR点云融合进行位置识别
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a retrieval and re-ranking framework for aerial-ground LiDAR place recognition, addressing domain gap and false positives.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对空地LiDAR点云位置识别中的域差距和假阳性问题，提出了一种基于补丁级自监督学习和扩展互重排的新框架。该方法利用机载激光扫描数据作为先验地图，克服了地面扫描视角有限和覆盖不全的缺点。实验表明该框架显著提升了跨视角检索精度，为多源遥感点云融合提供了有效方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对空地LiDAR点云位置识别中的域差距和假阳性问题，提出了一种基于补丁级自监督学习和扩展互重排的新框架。该方法利用机载激光扫描数据作为先验地图，克服了地面扫描视角有限和覆盖不全的缺点。实验表明该框架显著提升了跨视角检索精度，为多源遥感点云融合提供了有效方案。
